status.sql: SELECT "from_address", SUM("value") AS "total_incoming" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRACES" WHERE "status" = 1 AND "from_address" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "from_address" /* Total incoming transfers for each address */ UNION ALL SELECT "to_address", SUM("value") AS "total_outgoing" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRACES" WHERE "status" = 1 AND "to_address" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "to_address" /* Total outgoing transfers for each address */
solved_subquestions_list: Calculate total incoming and outgoing transfers for each Ethereum address from TRACES.

status.sql: WITH incoming AS (SELECT "from_address", SUM("value") AS "total_incoming" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRACES" WHERE "status" = 1 AND "from_address" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "from_address"), outgoing AS (SELECT "to_address", SUM("value") AS "total_outgoing" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRACES" WHERE "status" = 1 AND "to_address" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "to_address"), miner_rewards AS (SELECT t."from_address", SUM(t."gas_price" * t."receipt_gas_used") AS "total_rewards" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRANSACTIONS" t GROUP BY t."from_address"), gas_fees AS (SELECT t."from_address", SUM(t."gas") AS "total_gas_fees" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRANSACTIONS" t GROUP BY t."from_address") SELECT COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") AS "address", COALESCE(i."total_incoming", 0) - COALESCE(o."total_outgoing", 0) + COALESCE(m."total_rewards", 0) - COALESCE(g."total_gas_fees", 0) AS "net_balance" FROM incoming i FULL OUTER JOIN outgoing o ON i."from_address" = o."to_address" FULL OUTER JOIN miner_rewards m ON COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") = m."from_address" FULL OUTER JOIN gas_fees g ON COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") = g."from_address" WHERE COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") IS NOT NULL
solved_subquestions_list: Calculate total incoming and outgoing transfers for each Ethereum address from TRACES.
Calculate net balance for each Ethereum address including miner rewards and gas fees.

status.sql: SELECT AVG(net_balance) / 1000000000000000 AS average_balance /* Convert to quadrillions */ FROM (SELECT COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") AS "address", COALESCE(i."total_incoming", 0) - COALESCE(o."total_outgoing", 0) + COALESCE(m."total_rewards", 0) - COALESCE(g."total_gas_fees", 0) AS "net_balance" FROM incoming i FULL OUTER JOIN outgoing o ON i."from_address" = o."to_address" FULL OUTER JOIN miner_rewards m ON COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") = m."from_address" FULL OUTER JOIN gas_fees g ON COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") = g."from_address" WHERE COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") IS NOT NULL ORDER BY net_balance DESC LIMIT 10) AS top_addresses /* Select top 10 addresses by net balance */
solved_subquestions_list: Calculate total incoming and outgoing transfers for each Ethereum address from TRACES.
Calculate net balance for each Ethereum address including miner rewards and gas fees.
Calculate the average balance of the top 10 Ethereum addresses by net balance.

status.sql: WITH incoming AS (SELECT "from_address", SUM("value") AS "total_incoming" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRACES" WHERE "status" = 1 AND "from_address" IS NOT NULL AND "call_type" NOT IN ('delegatecall', 'callcode', 'staticcall') GROUP BY "from_address"), outgoing AS (SELECT "to_address", SUM("value") AS "total_outgoing" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRACES" WHERE "status" = 1 AND "to_address" IS NOT NULL AND "call_type" NOT IN ('delegatecall', 'callcode', 'staticcall') GROUP BY "to_address"), miner_rewards AS (SELECT t."from_address", SUM(t."gas_price" * t."receipt_gas_used") AS "total_rewards" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRANSACTIONS" t GROUP BY t."from_address"), gas_fees AS (SELECT t."from_address", SUM(t."gas") AS "total_gas_fees" FROM "ETHEREUM_BLOCKCHAIN"."TRANSACTIONS" t GROUP BY t."from_address") SELECT AVG(net_balance) / 1000000000000000 AS "average_balance" /* Convert to quadrillions */ FROM (SELECT COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") AS "address", COALESCE(i."total_incoming", 0) - COALESCE(o."total_outgoing", 0) + COALESCE(m."total_rewards", 0) - COALESCE(g."total_gas_fees", 0) AS "net_balance" FROM incoming i FULL OUTER JOIN outgoing o ON i."from_address" = o."to_address" FULL OUTER JOIN miner_rewards m ON COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") = m."from_address" FULL OUTER JOIN gas_fees g ON COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") = g."from_address" WHERE COALESCE(i."from_address", o."to_address") IS NOT NULL ORDER BY net_balance DESC LIMIT 10) AS top_addresses /* Select top 10 addresses by net balance */
solved_subquestions_list: Calculate total incoming and outgoing transfers for each Ethereum address from TRACES.
Calculate net balance for each Ethereum address including miner rewards and gas fees.
Calculate the average balance of the top 10 Ethereum addresses by net balance.
